creator: oleg.ginzburg@nevosoft.ru
text:
System book ok when both

sdhci_load
ahci_load

set to "YES" in /boot/loader.conf

but make "Fatal trap 12" when enabled only sdhci.

Also, unload ahci where both module is loaded makes system crash.

How-To-Repeat: Have /boot/loader.conf like

#ahci_load="YES"
sdhci_load="YES"
